zh.lifeSummary: 當Alyce Paston於1545年出生在英國諾福爾可費爾比時，她的父親Thomas Paston30歲，母親Anne    "Lady" Leigh26歲。她於大約1560年與Thomas Pyxton or Pickston Sr.在英國英格蘭諾福爾可費爾比結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1608年3月23日在她的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可費爾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alyce Paston于1545年出生在英国諾福爾可費爾比时，她的父亲Thomas Paston30岁，母亲Anne    "Lady" Leigh26岁。她于大约1560年与Thomas Pyxton or Pickston Sr.在英国英格兰諾福爾可費爾比结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1608年3月23日在她的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可費爾比。

nameMeanings.name: Paston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): habitational name, chiefly from Paston in Norfolk, probably derived from an Old English personal name Pæcci (genitive Pæcces) or Old English pæsc(e) (the source of northern English dialect pash ‘puddle’) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

English (West Midlands): sometimes a variant of Patstone, a habitational name chiefly from the lost Padston(e) in Bromsgrove (Worcestershire), and occasionally from Padson in Inwardleigh (Devon). The Worcestershire placename derives from the Old English personal name Padda (genitive Paddes) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The etymology of the Devon placename is uncertain due to a lack of medieval forms, though an early spelling suggests the final element is Old English dūn ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Alyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Alyce Paston was born in 1545, in Filby, Norfolk, England, her father, Thomas Paston, was 30 and her mother, Anne    "Lady" Leigh, was 26. She married Thomas Pyxton or Pickston Sr. about 1560, in Filby, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 23 March 1608, in her hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Filby, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alyce Paston est née en 1545, à Filby, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Paston, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anne    "Lady" Leigh, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Pyxton or Pickston Sr. environ 1560, à Filby, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 mars 1608, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Filby, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alyce Paston 1545 in Filby, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Paston 30 und ihre Mutter Anne    "Lady" Leigh 26. Sie hat um 1560 in Filby, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Thomas Pyxton or Pickston Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. März 1608 im Alter von 63 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Filby, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alyce Paston è nata il nel 1545 nel Filby, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Thomas Paston, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Anne    "Lady" Leigh, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Pyxton or Pickston Sr. circa 1560, nel Filby, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 marzo 1608, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Filby, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alyce Pastonが1545年にイギリスノーフォルクフィルビーで生まれた時，父Thomas Pastonは30歳，母Anne    "Lady" Leighは26歳であった。約1560年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクフィルビーでThomas Pyxton or Pickston Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1608年3月23日に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクフィルビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alyce Paston(이)가 1545년 영국 노르폴크 피비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Paston(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne    "Lady" Leigh(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 피비에서 Thomas Pyxton or Pickston Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1608년 3월 23일 그녀의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 피비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alyce Paston nasceu em 1545, em Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Paston, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anne    "Lady" Leigh, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Pyxton or Pickston Sr. aproximadamente 1560, em Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de março de 1608, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alyce Paston родилась в 1545 г. в местности филби, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Paston было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne    "Lady" Leigh, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Pyxton or Pickston Sr. около 1560 г. в местности филби, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 марта 1608 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности филби, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alyce Paston nació en 1545, en Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Paston, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anne    "Lady" Leigh, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Thomas Pyxton or Pickston Sr. aproximadamente 1560, en Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1608, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
